## NADIA Study Review

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Synapse Project** | |
| **Study Name** | |
| **External Accessions** | |
| **Study Leads** | |
| **Assay Types** | |
| **File Count** | |

---

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Study name is accurate and meaningful
- [ ] Correct disease focus and manifestation values
- [ ] Study leads are correct
- [ ] Assay type(s) are correct
- [ ] File annotations look reasonable
- [ ] Wiki summary is informative

---

## Actions

**To request annotation fixes:**
```
/nadia fix: <describe what needs to be changed>
```

**To check current status:**
```
/nadia status
```

**To approve:** Apply the `approved` label to this issue.
